Because of this, Lincoln hid the fact he was bisexual from everyone and started bullying others to cope with his frustrations, finding that he found pleasure from inflicting pain on others, mainly people weaker than him and unable to stand up against him. However, one day his urges were too much to suppress. He had to fuck a guy. And so, he went to the only place he could think of for answers. Reddit. He found out about S&M, and an app he could use to find other people interested in S&M to hook up with, he thought finding a submissive partner would be the easiest way to manipulate his partner into keeping the hookup a secret. And. Well, he also thought that if his partner was easy to manipulate, they could possibly turn the hook-up into a recurring thing... As a secret, of course.
